title: Cuneiform Tablet #0370: Hellenistic School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
